title: GenerationArtifact
description: Artifact produced by the generate stage, merging stage3_output, equivalence_results, and translation_reviews

plugin_path.description: Relative path to the generated scorer plugin Go file

plugin_test_path.description: Relative path to the generated scorer plugin test Go file

consensus_reached.description: Whether the reviewer loop reached consensus

reviewer_findings.description: Per-reviewer findings from the last generation round

tekton_values_path.description: Relative path to the generated Tekton values YAML file
